author: ckep1
description: Open notes & new tabs in the sidebar in the mobile app.

manifest.author: Chris Kephart
manifest.description: Open notes in left or right mobile sidebars with commands, quick tabs, and optional auto-pin.
manifest.name: Mobile Sidebar Notes

name: Mobile Sidebar Notes

releases.author: ckep1
releases.description:
## Sidebar tab management

- **Move tabs between locations**: new commands and tab-menu actions to move the active tab into a sidebar, back to the main area, or to the other sidebar — scroll position is preserved.
- **Open today's daily note** directly in a sidebar (resolves and creates it via your core Daily notes settings).
- **Close all note tabs** in a sidebar, or **deduplicate** repeated notes, in one command. Core sidebar views (Search, Backlinks, etc.) are left untouched.
- Main-area note menus also offer **Move to left/right sidebar**, handy when a note opens in the center instead of the sidebar it was triggered from.

This release also attaches `styles.css` (omitted from prior releases).

releases.author: ckep1
releases.description:
## Pin/Unpin sidebar tabs

- Adds a **Pin/Unpin** option to the long-press context menu on sidebar tabs
- Manually unpinned tabs are now respected when auto-pin is enabled

releases.author: ckep1
releases.description:
## v1.1.0

### New: Left Sidebar Support (#2)

Each note command now has its own **sidebar side selector** — choose left or right per command (defaults to right). The "Open new sidebar tab" command has been split into two:

- **Open new right sidebar tab**
- **Open new left sidebar tab**

Configured note commands now display as "Open [Title] in [left/right] sidebar" for clarity.

### Fix: Auto-Pin Tabs (#1, #3)

Auto-pin now correctly pins tabs opened via links within the sidebar. Previously, clicking a link in a sidebar note could replace the tab content instead of opening in a new tab. Now any file opened in either sidebar is automatically pinned when the setting is enabled.

Thanks to @nitero for reporting the auto-pin issue and submitting a fix, as well as suggesting left sidebar support.

releases.author: ckep1
releases.description:
Implement fixes and changes for review compliance

- Replaced manual path sanitization with normalizePath
- Updated UI text to use sentence case properly
- Replaced h3 element with Setting.setHeading()
- Replaced custom autocomplete implementation and styles in favor of AbstractInputSuggest
- Replaced timeouts for debouncing with Obsidian debounce utility
